articles.title: Rare identical quadruplets born in Australia - BBC
articles.description: The parents of the four naturally conceived girls were taken by "immense surprise" with the pregnancy, the hospital said.
articles.content: In a message alongside the fundraiser, which has already received over A$37,000 (£19,261) in donations, Na'amoana wrote: "Our four precious miracles have arrived safely, and while our hearts are over… [+124 chars]
